stemHtml: Which of the following can be expected to reduce the range at which an aircraft can receive VHF transmissions from a ground station?

options.a: Vehicles parked close to the ground transmitter.
options.b: Increasing the altitude of the receiving aircraft.
options.c: Changing frequency to one at the lower end of the VHF band.
options.d: A temperature inversion above the aircraft`s altitude.
